title: unique case not supported
body:
Looking at parts of the codebase, it seems like there is the groundwork for adding unique case support.

However, trying to parse a file with a `unique case` results in various errors:
```
module test(
            input logic  clk,
            input logic  d,
            output logic q
            );

   always_ff @(posedge clk) begin
      unique case(d)
        0: q <= 1;
        1: q <= 0;
      endcase // unique case (d)
   end

endmodule // test
```

```
$ iverilog -g2012 test.sv
test.sv:8: syntax error
test.sv:9: Syntax in assignment statement l-value.
test.sv:10: syntax error
test.sv:10: Syntax in assignment statement l-value.
test.sv:11: syntax error
I give up.
```

Removing the unique decorator on the case statement results in the file parsing with no errors.
code_blocks:
$ iverilog -g2012 test.sv
test.sv:8: syntax error
test.sv:9: Syntax in assignment statement l-value.
test.sv:10: syntax error
test.sv:10: Syntax in assignment statement l-value.
test.sv:11: syntax error
I give up.
